title: Step 1: Create a New Correlation Object
description:
Step 1: Create a New Correlation Object

Step 1: Create a New Correlation Object

	Click the [All Tools] - the
	 [New Correlation] button  on the Vision Guide toolbar.
	The mouse cursor will change to a correlation icon.
	Move the mouse cursor over the image display of the
	 Vision Guide window and click the left mouse button to place the Correlation
	 object on the image display.
	Notice that a name for the
	 object is automatically created.  In the example, it is called
	 "Corr01" because this is the first Correlation object created
	 for this sequence. (We will explain how to change the name later.)
